items.title_en: With Netflix new ad-free standard plan at $20, streaming's tipping point into old TV is getting closer
items.title_zh: Netflix 新的无广告标准计划售价为 20 美元，流媒体进入旧电视的转折点越来越近
items.desc_en: The economics of streaming are nearing the point where cheaper plans with ads make as much if not more money for services like Netflix.
items.desc_zh: 流媒体的经济效益已经接近这样的程度：更便宜的广告套餐可以为 Netflix 等服务赚到同样多的钱，甚至更多。

items.title_en: Iran warns against complying with US sanctions as Gulf attacks reported
items.title_zh: 据报道海湾袭击事件，伊朗警告不要遵守美国制裁

items.title_en: SEC delay on prediction markets ETFs echoes a long-fought bitcoin fund battle
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会 (SEC) 推迟预测市场 ETF，呼应了一场旷日持久的比特币基金大战
items.desc_en: The Securities and Exchange Commission has delayed approval for prediction markets ETFs, bringing up memories of the long battle over bitcoin funds.
items.desc_zh: 美国证券交易委员会推迟了对预测市场 ETF 的批准，让人回想起围绕比特币基金的长期斗争。

items.title_en: Alphabet's 160% rally in a year reflects value of owning 'most of the stack' in AI
items.title_zh: Alphabet 一年内上涨 160% 反映了拥有人工智能领域“大部分股权​​”的价值
items.desc_en: Google was seen as an AI laggard in the early days of the AI boom, but investors are now betting that the search giant will be a clear winner.
items.desc_zh: 在人工智能繁荣初期，谷歌被视为人工智能的落后者，但投资者现在押注这家搜索巨头将成为明显的赢家。

items.title_en: Target is trying to win back busy families from Walmart, starting with the baby aisle
items.title_zh: 塔吉特正试图从沃尔玛手中夺回忙碌的家庭，从婴儿通道开始
items.desc_en: Target is refreshing its baby category as part of a broader effort to offer better products and more convenience to compete with Walmart and Amazon.
items.desc_zh: 塔吉特正在更新其婴儿品类，作为更广泛努力的一部分，以提供更好的产品和更便利的方式与沃尔玛和亚马逊竞争。

items.title_en: Retailers are on a hiring spree. But consumers are sending warning signs
items.title_zh: 零售商正在大举招聘。但消费者正在发出警告信号
items.desc_en: The retail trades added nearly 22,000 jobs  in April, accounting for about one-fifth of total job growth.
items.desc_zh: 4月份零售业增加了近22,000个就业岗位，约占总就业增长的五分之一。

items.title_en: Memory chip makers are looking at a 'supercycle' and 'windfall gains.' The stocks jumped 30% in one week
items.title_zh: 存储芯片制造商正在寻找“超级周期”和“意外收益”。股价一周暴涨30%
items.desc_en: Higher prices on chips are boosting margin projections through 2027.
items.desc_zh: 芯片价格上涨提高了 2027 年利润预测。

items.title_en: Tanker crosses Strait of Hormuz as U.S. waits for Iran's response to peace proposal
items.title_zh: 油轮穿越霍尔木兹海峡，美国等待伊朗对和平提议的回应
items.desc_en: The QatarEnergy-operated carrier Al Kharaitiyat passed safely through the strait and was heading for Pakistan, according to shipping analytics firm Kpler.
items.desc_zh: 据航运分析公司 Kpler 称，卡塔尔能源公司运营的 Al Kharaitiyat 号航母安全通过该海峡，前往巴基斯坦。

items.title_en: Army parachutes onto remote island to help Briton with suspected hantavirus
items.title_zh: 陆军降落伞到偏远岛屿帮助患有疑似汉坦病毒的英国人
items.desc_en: The specialist team parachuted onto Tristan da Cunha, a remote British overseas territory, to treat them.
items.desc_zh: 专家小组空降到英国偏远海外领土特里斯坦达库尼亚岛对他们进行治疗。

items.title_en: Spanish passengers start disembarkation from ship hit by hantavirus
items.title_zh: 西班牙乘客开始从感染汉坦病毒的船上下船
items.desc_en: Eight people on board fell ill, including three who died. Hantavirus is usually spread by rodents but can in rare cases be transmitted person-to-person.
items.desc_zh: 机上八人患病，其中三人死亡。汉坦病毒通常由啮齿动物传播，但在极少数情况下也可在人与人之间传播。

items.title_en: Suspected boat explosion injures 11 in Miami
items.title_zh: 迈阿密疑似船只爆炸造成11人受伤

items.desc_zh: 官员们正在调查佛罗里达州南部一个热门码头发生爆炸的原因。

items.desc_en: The Venerable Pallegama Hemarathana Thero holds one of the most revered positions in the Buddhist world.
items.desc_zh: 帕勒伽玛·赫马拉提罗 (Pallegama Hemarathana Thero) 尊者是佛教界最受尊敬的职位之一。

items.title_zh: 普京表示他认为乌克兰冲突“即将结束”

items.desc_zh: 尽管上个月宣布了停火协议，以色列和真主党仍在继续交火。

items.title_en: Why one of the nation's largest auto lenders isn't worried about high vehicle prices or 'forever loans'
items.title_zh: 为什么美国最大的汽车贷款机构之一不担心高车价或“永久贷款”
items.desc_en: While median car payments have jumped from $390 to $525 since 2019, data provided by Capital One suggests stability in vehicle cost compared to income.
items.desc_zh: 尽管自 2019 年以来，汽车支付中位数已从 390 美元跃升至 525 美元，但第一资本提供的数据表明，与收入相比，汽车成本保持稳定。

items.title_en: Hungary's new PM to be sworn in during 'regime change' party
items.title_zh: 匈牙利新总理将在“政权更迭”派对上宣誓就职
items.desc_en: Nearly a month ago Péter Magyar steered his Tisza party to a landslide victory, sweeping away 16 years of rule by Viktor Orbán.
items.desc_zh: 大约一个月前，彼得·马扎尔 (Péter Magyar) 带领蒂萨党取得压倒性胜利，推翻了欧尔班·维克多 (Viktor Orbán) 16 年的统治。

items.title_en: Australian by-election a litmus test for right-wing One Nation Party
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚补选是右翼一国党的试金石
items.desc_en: Victory for the populist party in Farrer, New South Wales, would see One Nation's first MP elected to Australia's national parliament.
items.desc_zh: 如果民粹主义政党在新南威尔士州法雷尔获胜，一国党将成为澳大利亚国民议会的第一位议员。

items.desc_en: While only rolled out to some TikTok users, the feature's bizarre AI-generated descriptions were shared widely.
items.desc_zh: 虽然仅向部分 TikTok 用户推出，但该功能由人工智能生成的奇异描述却被广泛分享。

items.title_en: Instagram privacy tech is turned off today- what does this mean for your DMs?
items.title_zh: Instagram 隐私技术今天关闭 - 这对您的私信意味着什么？
items.desc_en: The platform said it would remove end-to-end encrypted messages, a major U‑turn by parent company Meta.
items.desc_zh: 该平台表示将删除端到端加密消息，这是母公司 Meta 的一个重大转变。

items.title_en: How sunburn inspired a new way to store energy
items.title_zh: 晒伤如何激发了一种储存能量的新方法
items.desc_en: Molecules that can capture heat could be a useful technology to decarbonise heating.
items.desc_zh: 能够捕获热量的分子可能是一种有用的供暖脱碳技术。

items.title_en: Used car prices fall for the first time this year and EV interest rises as gas prices spike
items.title_zh: 二手车价格今年首次下跌，随着汽油价格飙升，电动汽车兴趣上升
items.desc_en: Cox Automotive reports affordability remains a key concern for buyers and that's driving increased demand for older vehicles as well as all-electric vehicles.
items.desc_zh: 考克斯汽车公司报告称，负担能力仍然是买家关注的一个主要问题，这推动了对旧车和全电动汽车的需求增加。

items.title_en: Meta brings High Court challenge over Ofcom fees
items.title_zh: Meta brings High Court challenge over Ofcom fees
items.desc_en: Meta said Ofcom's calculations were "disproportionate"; the regulator said it would defend its position.
items.desc_zh: Meta表示Ofcom的计算“不成比例”； the regulator said it would defend its position.

items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，随着对超快速交付的需求的增长，它希望慢慢扩大这项服务。

items.desc_zh: 这场不和加剧了两家科技巨头之间代价高昂的摊牌。

items.title_en: Former OpenAI board member says Elon Musk offered her sperm donations
items.title_zh: 前 OpenAI 董事会成员表示埃隆·马斯克愿意捐献她的精子
items.desc_en: Shivon Zilis is the mother of four of Musk's children. That relationship began as she advised OpenAI.
items.desc_zh: Shivon Zilis 是马斯克四个孩子的母亲。这种关系始于她为 OpenAI 提供建议时。

items.title_en: Robot wars - what an operation in Ukraine tells us about the battlefield of the near future
items.title_zh: 机器人战争——乌克兰的一次行动告诉我们关于不久的将来的战场
items.desc_en: After Ukraine's President Zelensky said territory had been captured using just robots and drones, what is the future of unmanned warfare?
items.desc_zh: 在乌克兰总统泽伦斯基表示仅使用机器人和无人机就占领了领土之后，无人战争的未来是什么？

items.desc_zh: 去年的指控称，这家科技公司的 Apple Intelligence 广告欺骗了 iPhone 买家。

items.desc_zh: 这些公司与商务部之间的新协议以拜登时代的协议为基础。

items.title_zh: Pornhub 将再次对一些英国用户开放

items.desc_zh: 完成 Apple 基于设备的年龄检查的英国 iPhone 用户将不再被阻止访问该网站的成人内容。
